SOURCE: MBSF (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment) 

COMMENT: We consider the beneficiary to be covered by a PACE plan if the beneficiary had Medicare enrollment 
for the month, the monthly beneficiary HMO (Medicare Advantage) indicator code was a value other 
than '0' (Not a member of an HMO) or '4' (Fee-for-service participant in case or disease management 
demonstration project), and the Part C managed care plan type code was for PACE (i.e., where
